episodes.title: I Was Raised in a Religious Cult | Welcome to ChiquitoCam
episodes.description:
I was raised in a cultish Pentecostal "Assemblies of God" church. Here is my story.

___________________________

Welcome to ChiquitoCam — I am a 5' 2" guy who’s into sharing my real-life experiences. This channel is a mix of gaming, vlogs, and my journey after leaving a strict Christian cult and rebuilding life on my own terms. Some videos are serious, some are just fun, but everything here is honest and personal. I don’t claim to have life figured out, but I like sharing the process, the crescendos and decrescendos, and the things I enjoy along the way.

Subscribe!

Follow ChiquitoCam on Instagram & TikTok (Link In Bio)
Check out my music channel The Imaginist (Link In Bio)
